content:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on app.py:
1	from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request, flash
2	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
3	from flask_login import LoginManager, UserMixin, login_user, login_required, logout_user, current_user
4	from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
5	from datetime import datetime
6	import os
7	
8	app = Flask(__name__)
9	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'your-secret-key'
10	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///tasks.db'
11	db = SQLAlchemy(app)
12	
13	login_manager = LoginManager()
14	login_manager.init_app(app)
15	login_manager.login_view = 'login'
16	
17	class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
18	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
19	    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
20	    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
21	    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)
22	
23	class Task(db.Model):
24	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
25	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
26	    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
27	    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
28	    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
29	    done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
30	    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
31	
32	@login_manager.user_loader
33	def load_user(user_id):
34	    return User.query.get(int(user_id))
35	
36	@app.route('/')
37	@login_required
38	def index():
39	    tasks = Task.query.filter_by(user_id=current_user.id).all()
40	    return render_template('index.html', tasks=tasks)
41	
42	@app.route('/register', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
43	def register():
44	    if request.method == 'POST':
45	        username = request.form.get('username')
46	        password = request.form.get('password')
47	        
48	        user_exists = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
49	        if user_exists:
50	            flash('Username already exists.')
51	            return redirect(url_for('register'))
52	        
53	        new_user = User(username=username, password=generate_password_hash(password, method='pbkdf2:sha256'))
54	        db.session.add(new_user)
55	        db.session.commit()
56	        flash('Registration successful! Please log in.')
57	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
58	    
59	    return render_template('register.html')
60	
61	@app.route('/login', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
62	def login():
63	    if request.method == 'POST':
64	        username = request.form.get('username')
65	        password = request.form.get('password')
66	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
67	        
68	        if user and check_password_hash(user.password, password):
69	            login_user(user)
70	            return redirect(url_for('index'))
71	        else:
72	            flash('Login failed. Check your username and password.')
73	            
74	    return render_template('login.html')
75	
76	@app.route('/logout')
77	@login_required
78	def logout():
79	    logout_user()
80	    return redirect(url_for('login'))
81	
82	@app.route('/add_task', methods=['POST'])
83	@login_required
84	def add_task():
85	    title = request.form.get('title')
86	    description = request.form.get('description')
87	    priority = request.form.get('priority')
88	    due_date_str = request.form.get('due_date')
89	    
90	    due_date = None
91	    if due_date_str:
92	        due_date = datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
93	        
94	    new_task = Task(title=title, description=description, priority=priority, due_date=due_date, owner=current_user)
95	    db.session.add(new_task)
96	    db.session.commit()
97	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
98	
99	@app.route('/toggle_task/<int:task_id>')
100	@login_required
101	def toggle_task(task_id):
102	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
103	    if task.owner != current_user:
104	        return redirect(url_for('index'))
105	    task.done = not task.done
106	    db.session.commit()
107	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
108	
109	@app.route('/delete_task/<int:task_id>')
110	@login_required
111	def delete_task(task_id):
112	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
113	    if task.owner != current_user:
114	        return redirect(url_for('index'))
115	    db.session.delete(task)
116	    db.session.commit()
117	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
118	
119	if __name__ == '__main__':
120	    with app.app_context():
121	        db.create_all()
122	    app.run(debug=True)
